calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-27-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Nov-15-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Eric Webb, Esq. for Plaintiff: E.O.C. Ord, Inc., dba Ord & Norman.
Plaintiff's Witness: Mr. Ord was sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: John Sapone as follows:
Damages $35,388.00
Prejudgment Interest $3,538.80
Attorney's Fees $11,929.50
Costs $1,260.16,
Punitive Damages $70,776.98, for a total of $122,893.44
Judgment signed in open court.
